final_mask_blur_px.description: Blur radius for final raw-mask guard feather. Smoothens inpaint edge. 0=no feather. Separate from laplacian_blend_grow (pyramid blend level) and mask_grow_px (model context dilation).
final_mask_blur_px.title: Final Mask Blur Px

laplacian_blend_grow.description: Controls Laplacian pyramid blend mask_low_res_dilation for inpaint. Larger values expand blend region at low-res level. Separate from mask_grow_px (dilation radii) and final_mask_blur_px (raw mask feather).
laplacian_blend_grow.title: Laplacian Blend Grow

mask_grow_px.description: Mask dilation radius in pixels. Controls LTXVDilateVideoMask radii. 0=no dilation, default=30 matches official full-res (stage2) radius
mask_grow_px.title: Mask Grow Px

ModelLibraryArtifact.description: A known catalog artifact with its scan status and provenance.
ModelLibraryArtifact.title: ModelLibraryArtifact

ModelLibraryScanResponse.description: Read-only scan result of the user-selected models root.
ModelLibraryScanResponse.title: ModelLibraryScanResponse

ModelProfileProblem.description:
Stable, typed problem object surfaced per profile/artifact.

``code`` is a machine-readable stable identifier (e.g. ``missing_path``,
``duplicate``, ``unknown_file``). ``severity`` drives UI badges.
``path``/``field`` are optional context anchors.
ModelProfileProblem.title: ModelProfileProblem

OutputFormat.description:
Primary output container/codec produced by the media encoder.

Lives in ``api_types`` (not ``services.media_encoder``) per §0A.F — services
import ``api_types`` so this keeps the DTO/service layering clean and avoids a
circular import. ``str`` enum so pydantic/OpenAPI serialize it as a plain
string.
OutputFormat.title: OutputFormat

PartialFile.description: A partial download artifact (``*.part`` / ``*.tmp``) — never installed.
PartialFile.title: PartialFile

UnknownFile.description: An unrecognized file in the models root (never deleted).
UnknownFile.title: UnknownFile

post.description: POST /api/generate — video generation from JSON body.

schema.title: Response Route Generate Api Generate Post

402.description: LTX API credits are insufficient for the requested generation

schema.title: Response Route Generate Image Api Generate Image Post
Response Route Generate Cancel Api Generate Cancel Post
Response Route Ic Lora Generate Api Ic Lora Generate Post

get.description: Read-only scan of the effective models root (admin-guarded, no path param).

schema.title: Response Route Download Progress Api Models Download Progress Get
Response Route Ltx Recommendation Api Models Ltx Recommendation Get
Response Route Retake Api Retake Post
Response Route Shutdown Api System Shutdown Post
